a.xlink:title: Start the conditional task processing thread if not already running.
Add a routine to the scheduler based on its processing token.
Execute pipeline synchronized to audio hardware cycle boundaries.
Execute the pipeline for a specified number of cycles.
Execute the pipeline for a single cycle.
Execute pipeline with sample-accurate timing between operations.
Schedules a callback to execute after a delay.
Spawn a per-frame GraphicsRoutine that calls sync_fn each tick.
Starts executing the event chain.
Route element bulk value to a caller-supplied sink each frame.
Route element value to an AudioWriteProcessor each frame.
Route element value to a DataWriteProcessor each frame.
Route element value into a Constant node via set_constant().
Start continuous execution of the pipeline.
Execute pipeline with real-time rate control.
Activates a buffer for a specified duration.
Activates a node network for a specified duration.
Activates a node for a specified duration.
Executes a pair of functions with a time interval between them.
Drive element value from an arbitrary per-frame callable.
Drive element value from a Node's output each frame.
